title: Tentacle-cactus
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''tentacle-cactus''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of plant that grew in arid climates. The plants, which could become quite large, sported thick stalks that were covered with long spines. The spines of the tentacle-cactus housed within the [[Skydome Botanical Gardens/Legends|Skydome Botanical Gardens]] were used to serve [[Wikipedia:hors d'oeuvre|hors d'œurves]] during special receptions.
